columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the bike station is located.

columns.name: dock_count
columns.description: Total number of docks available at the station.

columns.name: installation_date
columns.description: Date when the station was installed.

columns.name: lat
columns.description: Latitude coordinate of the bike station.

columns.name: long
columns.description: Longitude coordinate of the bike station.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the bike station.

columns.name: bikes_available
columns.description: Number of bikes available at the station at the given time.

columns.name: docks_available
columns.description: Number of docks available at the station at the given time.

columns.name: station_name
columns.description: Name of the station associated with the status record.

columns.name: time
columns.description: Timestamp for the status record.

columns.name: bike_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the bike used during the trip.

columns.name: duration
columns.description: Duration of the trip in seconds.

columns.name: end_date
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the trip ended.

columns.name: end_station_name
columns.description: Name of the station where the trip ended.

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the trip started.

columns.name: start_station_name
columns.description: Name of the station where the trip started.

columns.name: subscription_type
columns.description: Type of user subscription (e.g., Subscriber or Customer).

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: ZIP code associated with the user who made the trip.

columns.name: cloud_cover
columns.description: Cloud cover on a scale from 0 (clear) to 10 (overcast).

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date for the weather record.

columns.name: events
columns.description: Weather events recorded (e.g., rain, snow, fog).

columns.name: max_dew_point_f
columns.description: Maximum dew point recorded in Fahrenheit.

columns.name: max_gust_speed_mph
columns.description: Maximum gust speed recorded in miles per hour.

columns.name: max_humidity
columns.description: Maximum humidity percentage recorded.

columns.name: max_sea_level_pressure_inches
columns.description: Maximum sea level pressure recorded in inches.

columns.name: max_temperature_f
columns.description: Maximum temperature recorded in Fahrenheit.

columns.name: max_visibility_miles
columns.description: Maximum visibility recorded in miles.

columns.name: max_wind_speed_mph
columns.description: Maximum wind speed recorded in miles per hour.

columns.name: mean_dew_point_f
columns.description: Average dew point recorded in Fahrenheit.

columns.name: mean_humidity
columns.description: Average humidity percentage recorded.

columns.name: mean_sea_level_pressure_inches
columns.description: Average sea level pressure recorded in inches.

columns.name: mean_temperature_f
columns.description: Average temperature recorded in Fahrenheit.

columns.name: mean_visibility_miles
columns.description: Average visibility recorded in miles.

columns.name: mean_wind_speed_mph
columns.description: Average wind speed recorded in miles per hour.

columns.name: min_dew_point_f
columns.description: Minimum dew point recorded in Fahrenheit.

columns.name: min_humidity
columns.description: Minimum humidity percentage recorded.

columns.name: min_sea_level_pressure_inches
columns.description: Minimum sea level pressure recorded in inches.

columns.name: min_temperature_f
columns.description: Minimum temperature recorded in Fahrenheit.

columns.name: min_visibility_miles
columns.description: Minimum visibility recorded in miles.

columns.name: precipitation_inches
columns.description: Amount of precipitation recorded in inches.

columns.name: wind_dir_degrees
columns.description: Average wind direction in degrees.

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: ZIP code where the weather data was recorded.
